title: viola × lacaitaeana
intro: Viola × lacaitaeana, also known as hybrid pansy, is a plant resulting from the cross-breeding of Viola sororia and Viola lactea. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Viola × lacaitaeana include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a sought-after remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Viola × lacaitaeana often involve infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
